_note: Fill this with real repo, deploy, and publishing links before submitting. Keep the metadata honest and replace placeholder fields only with values you actually used.
name: Veiled Oracle
description: Private analysis agent built around Venice AI's no-data-retention inference. It analyzes sensitive on-chain data privately, then emits public verdicts plus stored reports and time-locked outputs via x402-powered services on Base.
problemStatement: AI agents analyzing treasuries, governance, or protocol risks must send sensitive financial data to inference providers that may store or train on it — the analysis itself becomes a leak. Veiled Oracle solves this by routing all reasoning through Venice AI's no-data-retention inference, splitting output into a public verdict and a private report, with every action paid via x402 USDC micropayments on Base as an auditable trail.

_trackNotes.3bf41be958da497bbb69f1a150c76af9: Agents With Receipts — ERC-8004 (x402 USDC receipts as audit trail)
_trackNotes.4026705215f3401db4f2092f7219561b: Agents for Public Goods Data Analysis (treasury/governance analysis)

submissionMetadata.agentFrameworkOther: Custom FastAPI service with x402 PaymentMiddlewareASGI and Venice AI inference pipeline
submissionMetadata.intentionNotes: Designed to become a private analysis layer for protocol risk, treasury review, and due diligence workflows where public outputs must be trustworthy without leaking raw context.
